name: Crumb Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 package Yellow cake mix with pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the cake mix according to the package directions.
2. Pour the batter into a greased and floured 9x13 inch pan.
3. Bake for 30 minutes.
4. Remove from the oven.
5. Have the topping ready: Mix flour, sugar, butter, cinnamon, chocolate chips, and chopped nuts (if using) in a bowl until the mixture is fairly smooth.
6. Spread the topping on top of the cake.
7. Return the cake to the oven.
8. Bake for the remainder of the time according to the package directions.
9. Remove from the oven and cool in the pan.
